arts.ttl: Millwall appoint ex-Preston and Stoke boss Neil
arts.sum: Millwall appoint former Preston, Sunderland and Stoke City boss Alex Neil as their head coach to replace Neil Harris.

arts.ttl: Preview: West Bromwich Albion vs. Preston North End - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Wednesday's Championship clash between West Bromwich Albion and Preston North End, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
